name: @agent-bridge/openclaw-channel
description: First-class OpenClaw channel plugin for agent-bridge. Registers `agent-bridge` as a native channel (same tier as telegram) via the plugin-sdk registerChannel API, with per-target replyVia routing so replies can go back over Telegram (phone ping) or over the agent-bridge back-channel (silent peer-to-peer).
author: EthanSK
